faq.question: Why do Los Angeles car prices vary so much between dealerships?
faq.answer: Los Angeles stores often layer add-ons, financing incentives and inventory-based markup differently, so the cheapest advertised number is not always the real deal. That is why many buyers use a car buying service Los Angeles shoppers can trust before they negotiate.
